mapper.sql: id,request_id AS requestId,request_fingerprint AS requestFingerprint,tenant_id AS tenantId,user_id AS userId, api_key_id AS apiKeyId,wallet_id AS walletId,currency_code AS currencyCode,reservation_amount AS reservationAmount, actual_amount AS actualAmount,settled_amount AS settledAmount,released_amount AS releasedAmount, outstanding_amount AS outstandingAmount,status,reason_code AS reasonCode,tenant_model_id AS tenantModelId, tenant_model_code AS tenantModelCode,inbound_protocol AS inboundProtocol,endpoint,price_version AS priceVersion, input_price_per_million AS inputPricePerMillion,output_price_per_million AS outputPricePerMillion, cache_write_price_per_million AS cacheWritePricePerMillion,cache_read_price_per_million AS cacheReadPricePerMillion, input_token_ceiling AS inputTokenCeiling,output_token_ceiling AS outputTokenCeiling, cache_write_token_ceiling AS cacheWriteTokenCeiling,cache_read_token_ceiling AS cacheReadTokenCeiling, upstream_dispatch_state AS upstreamDispatchState,reserved_at AS reservedAt,finalized_at AS finalizedAt, reconciled_at AS reconciledAt,reconciled_by AS reconciledBy,reconciliation_note AS reconciliationNote, created_at AS createdAt,updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_reservation WHERE request_id=#{requestId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id,tenant_id AS tenantId,user_id AS userId,currency_code AS currencyCode,balance,frozen_balance AS frozenBalance FROM user_credit_account WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_reservation(request_id,request_fingerprint,tenant_id,user_id,api_key_id,wallet_id,currency_code, reservation_amount,status,tenant_model_id,tenant_model_code,inbound_protocol,endpoint,price_version, input_price_per_million,output_price_per_million,cache_write_price_per_million,cache_read_price_per_million, input_token_ceiling,output_token_ceiling,cache_write_token_ceiling,cache_read_token_ceiling) VALUES(#{request.requestId},#{fingerprint},#{request.tenantId},#{request.userId},#{request.apiKeyId},#{walletId},#{request.currencyCode}, #{amount},'RESERVED',#{request.tenantModelId},#{request.tenantModelCode},#{request.inboundProtocol},#{request.endpoint},#{request.priceVersion}, #{inputPrice},#{outputPrice},#{cacheWritePrice},#{cacheReadPrice}, #{request.inputTokenCeiling},#{request.outputTokenCeiling},#{request.cacheWriteTokenCeiling},#{request.cacheReadTokenCeiling}) ON CONFLICT (request_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: UPDATE user_credit_account SET balance=balance-#{amount},frozen_balance=frozen_balance+#{amount},updated_at=NOW() WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND balance >= #{amount} RETURNING balance+#{amount} AS balance_before,balance AS balance_after, frozen_balance-#{amount} AS frozen_balance_before,frozen_balance AS frozen_balance_after

UPDATE user_credit_account SET balance=balance+#{releasedAmount},frozen_balance=frozen_balance-#{reservedAmount},updated_at=NOW() WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND frozen_balance >= #{reservedAmount} RETURNING balance-#{releasedAmount} AS balance_before,balance AS balance_after, frozen_balance+#{reservedAmount} AS frozen_balance_before,frozen_balance AS frozen_balance_after

UPDATE user_credit_account SET balance=balance+#{amount},frozen_balance=frozen_balance-#{amount},updated_at=NOW() WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND frozen_balance >= #{amount} RETURNING balance-#{amount} AS balance_before,balance AS balance_after, frozen_balance+#{amount} AS frozen_balance_before,frozen_balance AS frozen_balance_after
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='RESERVE_REJECTED',reason_code=#{reasonCode},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RESERVED'

UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='SETTLED',actual_amount=#{actualAmount},settled_amount=#{actualAmount},released_amount=#{releasedAmount},outstanding_amount=0,reason_code=NULL,upstream_dispatch_state=#{dispatchState},finalized_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RESERVED'

UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='RELEASED',released_amount=#{releasedAmount},actual_amount=0,settled_amount=0,outstanding_amount=0,reason_code=#{reasonCode},upstream_dispatch_state=#{dispatchState},finalized_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RESERVED'

UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING',actual_amount=#{actualAmount},outstanding_amount=#{outstandingAmount},reason_code=#{reasonCode},upstream_dispatch_state=#{dispatchState},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RESERVED'

UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING',reason_code='TERMINAL_EVENT_TIMEOUT',upstream_dispatch_state='UNKNOWN',updated_at=NOW() WHERE status='RESERVED' AND reserved_at < #{olderThan}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_transaction(tenant_id,user_id,direction,delta,balance_before,balance_after, frozen_balance_before,frozen_balance_after,reason,source,transaction_type,reservation_id,operator_id,operator_name,created_at) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{userId},#{direction},#{delta},#{balanceBefore},#{balanceAfter}, #{frozenBalanceBefore},#{frozenBalanceAfter},#{reason},'BILLING',#{transactionType},#{reservationId},#{userId},'API 请求自动结算',NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM billing_reservation WHERE status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING' AND tenant_id=#{tenantId}
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='SETTLED',actual_amount=#{actualAmount},settled_amount=#{actualAmount},released_amount=#{releasedAmount},outstanding_amount=0,reason_code='MANUAL_SETTLE',finalized_at=NOW(),reconciled_at=NOW(),reconciled_by=#{operatorId},reconciliation_note=#{note},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING'

UPDATE billing_reservation SET status='RELEASED',actual_amount=0,settled_amount=0,released_amount=#{releasedAmount},outstanding_amount=0,reason_code='MANUAL_RELEASE',finalized_at=NOW(),reconciled_at=NOW(),reconciled_by=#{operatorId},reconciliation_note=#{note},updated_at=NOW() WHERE request_id=#{requestId} AND status='RECONCILIATION_PENDING'
